chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Copyright_letter_Письмо об авторском праве (на материалы презентации)
chunk.source: /content/drive/MyDrive/minekg/raw/Материалы конференций/Copyright_letter_Письмо об авторском праве (на материалы презентации).pdf
chunk.text: Dear Delegate As organiser of this conference we would like to thank you for your attendance; we hope you found it both informative and stimulating. Throughout the conference we hope you found the information provided; along with your notes a valuable source of reference for you and your company. Please note that all material provided are the copyright of the speakers and Informa, material must not be reproduced in any manner without written permission. Representatives of the media who attended the conference must gain approval before reporting or quoting the verbal and/or written presentations from the speakers. We endeavour to obtain the presentations and relevant information from all sessions; some speakers do not make their material available. We will at all times try to ensure you receive complete conference proceedings. Thank you and we look forward to welcoming you to future events; please visit our website.
